long_description: Changes to CBR rules for Kubernetes Service cluster masters might not take effect
short_description: Unable to modify CSE ACL rules
close_notes: CSE team ran scripts in all regions to correct the etcd errors that wer the cause of the issue
current_status_next_steps: CSE team is currently on the teams call with IKS and working to run the scripts to mitigate the issue for the affected regions.
customer_facing_impact: Users may have issues with provisioning new resources
chronology:
Response Team Participants (add abbrev. role and name as needed)
=====================
SRE(s): Megha Bhalja, Dilip D R
Kiranbabu R A, Gurdial Singh,
IKS: Brad Behle, Gururaj Pyati, Shrikumar Udupa
DEV:
MGR: 
iPOPs:
AVM: Shruti A, Ian Jack
Dir: Ankur Srivastava

Slack(s):  #   #cloudserviceendpoint-cie 
https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C020QNHJLF7/p1765010833499289
MS Teams:  https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/25615523137615?p=j4ER4edyRgPxf4Wbar



Times in UTC
[2025-Dec-06]

08:47 SRE created sev 4CIE 
08:48 Shruti Joining as AVM OnDuty and checking if the severity is correct.
08:50 SRE updated that the issue is intermittent and they want to focus on fixing it for IKS first and then asses the severity
08:55 SRE is working with the team to create and run the ECR to run the scripts to mitigate the issue
09:03 Sydney and Sao P region has been completed and team is now moving to TOR 
09:06 IKS will run some tests in SYD to confirm the issue is resolved. SRE will continue roll out to other regions
09:11 US-east and CA-Tor have been completed
09:20 US-south and EU-GB completed
09:23 IKS initial testing in SYD appears to be positive
09:29 SRE confirmed that this is related to previous INC10477204
09:28 EU-FRA completed
09:30 All regions are completed

=============================
               FOR AVM REFERENCE
=============================
